principles: Original assets are never overwritten or deleted by AI.
Manual links are authoritative and remain stable.
Current usage is factual and generated from published content.
AI matches are dynamic suggestions and can be recalculated as new knowledge objects, pages and campaigns are added.
Locked placements can never be changed automatically.
New AI analysis never breaks existing approved usage.

source.original_path: relative GitHub path or future object-storage key
source.github_sha: Git blob SHA used for move/replacement detection

lifecycle.status: active | reserve | seasonal | campaign | rejected | archived

on_new_asset: Match against all live and draft knowledge objects.
Match against page sections, audiences, seasons and campaigns.
Do not activate any placement automatically.
on_new_or_changed_knowledge_object: Re-evaluate AI matches for relevant assets.
Preserve manual links, current usage and locked placements.
Store suggestions separately from approved relations.
on_page_or_campaign_change: Never replace a locked or currently approved asset without explicit approval.

safety: visual analysis appends history before replacing the current AI profile
current approved usage is never replaced
only AI suggestions are recalculated automatically

sync_engine.new_file: Create a pending Asset Object and queue visual analysis.
sync_engine.same_sha_new_path: Treat as moved/renamed and preserve the Asset Object, analysis and relations.
sync_engine.same_path_new_sha: Treat as replaced content; preserve manual metadata and relations, queue visual reanalysis.
sync_engine.missing_but_in_use: Block archive until replacement or explicit owner decision.
sync_engine.delete_asset_object: Only after explicit manual confirmation and only when no locked/current usage remains.
